acceptance_criteria.text: Add an optional preflight property to schemas/work-item.schema.json (created_before_work_started const true, created_at date-time, note non-empty) validating the marker shape when present.

Add opt-in, default-off preflight config read from governance/owners.json (enabled, required_from_id, required_from_date) and a generalized validate_work_preflight in validate_repo.py that requires a marker for qualifying work items.
Tests cover off-by-default, required_from_id (at/below threshold), marker-satisfies-requirement, and required_from_date; all gates (validate, unittest, dashboard, spec) pass.
